verses.arabicText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَٰمًۭا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ
verses.translationText: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

verses.arabicText: وَذَلَّلْنَٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.translationText: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.

verses.arabicText: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.translationText: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?

verses.arabicText: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةًۭ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.translationText: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

verses.arabicText: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّحْضَرُونَ
verses.translationText: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

verses.arabicText: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.translationText: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

verses.arabicText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍۢ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?

verses.arabicText: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًۭا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"

verses.arabicText: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.translationText: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."

verses.arabicText: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًۭا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.translationText: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.

verses.arabicText: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.translationText: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.translationText: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.

verses.arabicText: فَسُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.translationText: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.
